---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Université de Montréal

**Lecturer**

- ECN 1000 — Introduction to Economics (undergraduate) — 2024–present

---

**Teaching Assistant**

- ECN 1050 — Principles of Microeconomics (undergraduate) — Fall 2023, Winter 2024
- ECN 1075 — Principles of Macroeconomics (undergraduate) — Fall 2023, Winter 2024
- ECN 1700 — Statistics for Economists (undergraduate) — Fall 2023, Winter 2024
